hotel_name: Khách sạn Hà Tiên Sea View (Hà Tiên Sea View Hotel)

reviews.title: Not good for Service
reviews.text: N/A

reviews.title: Just don't go there
reviews.text:
We were supposed to stay two nights, we left after one.
People are singing karaoke until 11pm across the road, paper thin windows.
Room is full of ants.
The swimming pool is 1.5km away, go by your own. (WTF!)
The reception guy was useless, nothing around to even get a coffee in the morning.
No hot water in the morning. Internet dropping off all the time (annoying when you're searching for another hotel at 6am).
Builders making noise...
Avoid at all costs!!

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Room smells very bad
reviews.response: Rất chân thành xin lỗi vì trải nghiệm không tốt của quý khách, đkhách sạn sẽ ghi nhận và cố gắng khắc phục vấn đề tốt nhất

reviews.title: Windowless family bedroom, swimming pool not on site
reviews.text: Our family bedroom had no windows or light. No other room was available, though the hotel hardly looked busy. Front desk service is minimalist. One of the staff more helpful than the other and recommended a local electric taxi. Didn’t enjoy staying there.

reviews.title: Decent and Budget-Friendly, but Manage Your Expectations
reviews.text:
Considering the low price, the room is decent enough, especially since options in the area are limited. However, keep in mind that the noise from the nearby night market can be a bit bothersome.

English communication with the staff is quite difficult, so you'll need to be patient. While there is no breakfast served on-site, the staff is happy to help you order food from outside. Ultimately, Ha Tien isn't a major tourist or business hub, so it's best to keep your expectations modest.
reviews.response: Thank you so much

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Good for us as overnight stop. New hotel, clean with friendly staff. Loud music from night market and surrounding, so not ideal for small children. A little out from the centre of town.
reviews.response: Thank you so much sir !

reviews.title: Be attentive with provided water
reviews.text: We booked two rooms. None of these rooms have 4 water bottles. There is no information whether they provided complimentary water or not. We opened one 355 ml bottle and we are not sure whether we have to pay for it or not. At checkout, we were forced to pay two bottles of water. I asked for information about number of bottles in the room. They insisted that each room was equipped with 2 small bottles and two big bottles. I disagreed because it was not correct for both rooms we have got. It’s not about the money, but it appeared that I have told lies about consumption of water. I traveled with  small children and I would never tell lies in front of children. There seems to be mismanagement here.

reviews.title: Ha Tien Sea View Hotel Review
reviews.text:
The hotel is located in the newer part of Ha Tien, which feels a little unusual since there’s not much else around except the ambitious “Vegas” project. A promotional video for it plays late into the night and can be heard from the rooms, which makes the atmosphere a bit strange.

On the positive side, the staff are excellent—friendly, attentive, and always willing to help. The hotel itself looks modern and stylish at first glance, and the facilities appear clean. However, on closer inspection, the cleaning isn’t thorough, and we even encountered cockroaches during our stay on the 4th floor.

Overall, it’s a modern property with great staff, but the location feels isolated, and the cleanliness could be improved.
reviews.response: Thank you !

reviews.title: Should go travel to Ha Tien.
reviews.text: The newly built hotel has beautiful and clean rooms, although somewhat small. The location is convenient, right at the night market and close to the beach. There is a parking lot. However, the reception staff needs to improve their customer service attitude.
reviews.response: Dạ bên khách sạn cảm ơn và xin ghi nhận phản hồi từ quý khách ạ !

reviews.title: Deceiving
reviews.text:
The pictures of the pool make it seem it on location rooftop perhaps and you are right on the beach front. Pool and clubhouse access is 1km away. There is no restaurant so if you do not have transport ( which lucky you can hire at the hotel) you are very far from everything during the day. 
Smart TVs are not fun in a hotel when you have to Google and YouTube except for just cable surf . When I wanted an all inclusive option so I could just stay in hotel and relax I found it not great. Also the walls are exceptionally thin to the other rooms or floors as you can hear EVERYTHING.
reviews.response: Cảm ơn Quý Khách hàng đã lựa chọn Hà Tiên Seaview cho chuyến nghỉ ngơi của mình, như chúng tôi đã thông tin đầy đủ trên các trang mạng xã hội, chúng tôi luôn cố gắng mang lại những trải nghiệm tốt nhất cho quý Khách hàng tương xứng với những gì khách hàng phải chi trả.

reviews.title: Vacation

The room w/o tv , air con is  not cold enought . Room is clean . 
I only stayed 1nite otherwise will get different room
reviews.response: Thank you so much, we fixed it !

reviews.title: Ha Tien Sea View Hotel – Great Potential, Mild Chaos
reviews.text:
A lovely new hotel on the edge of town—only a five‑minute stroll to the centre. The room is modern and stylish but I didn’t care much for the cockroaches .

The windows don’t seal particularly well, so you’ll be treated to Ha Tien’s unofficial soundtrack: either the relentless “Vegas! Vegas!” sales pitch from the street or a passionate karaoke performance from someone who definitely believes they’re on the brink of stardom. Bring earplugs or embrace the local entertainment.

On the bright side, the reception staff are absolute gems—friendly, helpful, and genuinely keen to make your stay smooth. They sorted a motorbike rental for us and even organised our onward ticket to Can Tho with zero fuss.

A good option if you like modern rooms, great service, and don’t mind a bit of ambient karaoke drifting through your evening.
reviews.response: Thank youuu so much !

Hi vọng được đón tiếp Qúy khách trong chuyến đi tiếp theo với các hạng phòng như Deluxe Seaview hoặc SRV ở đó chúng tôi có cửa sổ view biển dành cho quý khách.

reviews.title: Review of the Seaview Family Room.
reviews.text: The hotel is a new place to stay close to the night market, convenient for traveling to tourist spots and dining. The staff is friendly, and the security guards are enthusiastic. However, there are some downsides: weak wifi, slow drainage in the bathroom leading to flooding, no trash bin in the room which is very inconvenient, and the room lacks a window which is not proportional to the price and has poor soundproofing.

reviews.title: The new hotel is very good, and the staff are enthusiastic and cheerful.
reviews.text:
I am very satisfied with my stay here, the staff are warm and cheerful, from the security guard to the receptionist. The location is very good, spacious, right below is the night market, New Vegas area, fun and dining. The hotel has a swimming pool and gym, however they are separate and require transportation by car. One drawback is that the air conditioning seems weak, not cool enough during the day. This needs to be fixed! 
(I made many separate bookings so the content is similar.)

Nhưng wifi yếu nha mọi người. KS nói do gần khu quân đội... chứ không phải tại KS xài gói mạng yếu. Mình xài 4G cũng yếu nên chắc đúng.

reviews.title: Escale à Han Tien
reviews.text:
Nous avions réservé il y a plusieurs mois et malgré cela nous avons eu une chambre en mauvaise état, sans fenêtre, avec la salle de bain inondée tout le temps et peu d'eau chaude. 

Ils mettent des boissons dans la chambre mais pas dans le mini bar donc impossible à boire fraiche en arrivant. 

Et pour couronner le tout la piscine se trouve à 1 kilomètre de l'hôtel et il faut payer le tuk tuk électrique pour s'y rendre et revenir ! 

Et pas de restaurant alors que c'est bien indiqué. Bref un hôtel mal conçu et mal géré.
reviews.response: Chào Quý Khách. Quý Khách đặt hạng phòng nào thì bên Khách sạn sẽ giao hạng phòng đó chứ không phụ thuộc vào việc đặt sớm hay muộn. Khách sạn có xe máy đưa khách đi Hồ Bơi miễn phí còn việc quý Khách chọn tự đi xe tuk tuk thì đi theo yêu cầu việc các xe đó thu phí hoàn toàn hợp lí

If you book this hotel, make sure you have a room on the road side (sea view I believe) and not on the other side.

reviews.text:
Une bonne expérience dans cet hôtel avec un rapport qualité prix excellent. 
L'hôtel se situe dans un futur quartier de promotion immobilière, donc à 20 minutes à pied du centre ville (trajet en venir pour 30 000d).
A noter sa proximité immédiate avec le marché de nuit . A savoir que la musique est forte jusque 23:00 ou minuit. 
L'établissement n'a pas de piscine . Cette mention est abusée à mon sens : la piscine est à 800m et un transport en pris en charge. Ce n'est pas là même chose que d'avoir une piscine dans l'hôtel. 
Donc je recommande en connaissance de cause, surtout pour un bon prix.
reviews.response: Thank you so much, hope to see you soon !

reviews.title: Bon rapport Qualite-Prix
reviews.text: Bel petit hotel construit voila 1 an,,,Le petit hic pour voyageurs , la piscine est situer a 800 metres et centre-ville un peu elogner ,,, j ai une moto pour moi ca me convient mais pour certain c est une bonne marche. ,, je recommende .
reviews.response: Thank you so much, hope to see you again !

reviews.title: Very clean, very nice staff
reviews.text: We spent 2 nights  as a couple. The hotel is very clean . There is little road traffic around so it is quiet. The staff is very nice. They organized the taxi to the bus station and called the bus station for our next trip to Cân Thó. There are many local restaurants around. We had access to the nearby club (around 10 mn walk) and there ias a nice swimming pool with a beautiful view on the sea - we enjoyed this by the end of a hot afternoon. Then we walked about 5 mn to the hill beside, where there are coffees and restaurants with another beautiful and quiet view on the sea. Highly recommended!
reviews.response: thanks you so much

reviews.title: Formidable !
reviews.text:
Un hôtel très bien situé et avec un personnel vraiment au top. Il est dans le nouveau quartier mais nous avons le marché nocturne, une vue splendide, et bar/restaurant à côté.
Le seul hic est que les travaux étaient toujours en cours et le karaoke effectivement tres bruyant (mais s’est arrêté a 22h même en week-end) , mais nous ne sommes pas venus à Ha tien pour rester a l’hôtel non plus. Le personnel est formidable et admirable.

reviews.title: 1 Tag in Ha Tien auf dem Weg nach Kambodscha
reviews.text:
Das Hotel ist 4 Monate alt, es bietet leider kein Frühstück an. Man sollte berücksichtigen, dass jeden Abend in unmittelbarer Nähe ein Nachtmarkt stattfindet und es bis 23.00 Uhr sehr laut sein kann.
Im näheren Umkreis gibt es auch Möglichkeiten, etwas zu essen .

reviews.title: Ha Tien

reviews.title: A lovely pleasant stay
reviews.text:
We just  spent two  night  at the sea view hotel in Ha Tien. And we like the simple but clean room. Good air con not noisy. Fridge working bed comfy good sea ocean  view from the window. Staff  very helpful and nice. We also were able  to use the infinite pool at the end of the beach. The only thing we  would like to suggest is that you  need your own transport to get around as the  hotel
Is not central.  20
Minutes walk to the centre of the town where all the shops are. But the night market is just at the  corner , But can only offer very very cheap items.
reviews.response: Thanks you so much, We are pleased to serve you😊😊

reviews.title: Mieren 🐜 overal en veel lawaai
reviews.text:
Hadden een kamer op de derde verdieping bij aankomst op de kamer liepen de mieren in colonne onder de deur naar binnen en terug naar buiten bij de vierde kamer dat ze voorstelden was ongedierte vrij  , naast het hotel zijn ze een nieuwe hotel aan het bouwen werkmannen beginnen om 7 u am tot 17 u pm volop lawaai niet te doen  ten allen tijden vermijden !!!! 
Gebouw zit volledig onder de mieren 🐜

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
Er is geen zwembad. Die is 600 meter verder.
Geenontbijt
Geen raam inde kamer
Gewoon klote
reviews.response: Ha Tien Sea View Hotel verontschuldigt zich voor uw slechte ervaring ! Onze tarieven zijn exclusief ontbijt, bij hotelfaciliteiten hebben wij dit bij aanvraag duidelijk aangegeven! U kiest voor een Superior kamer, dit is een kamer zonder ramen maar het bed is kingsize, van elk kamertype hebben wij duidelijke foto’s in de app! We hadden niet genoeg ruimte om een ​​zwembad in het hotel te bouwen, dus moesten we het buiten bouwen. Onze oprechte excuses hiervoor !

reviews.title: Hotel ligt afgelegen tegen de vreselijke herrie van een nightMarket. Het gebied is in ontwikkeling en sfeerloos.  Kamer  oké, badkamer stond blank na het douchen en liep niet leeg.. oplossing: zet de
reviews.text: Niet naar toe.
reviews.response: Thanks for visit ! Because the location of the hotel, near night market, so it will take some noise. Next time if you have time to visit us again, i suggest you SUPERIOR room, it's in side - no noise - it's good if you want to go to bed early

reviews.title: Waar voor je geld……
reviews.text: Nieuw hotel, schoon en vriendelijk en behulpzaam personeel. De plek is ook speciaal , bij het centrum van de nightmarket, beetje kermis maar wel bijzonder.  Ik had een kamer met uitzicht op vele activiteiten en zeezicht… erg leuk!

reviews.title: Khách sạn tốt, thái độ nhân viên không thân thiện
reviews.text:
Mình đi với bạn ở 2 phòng, mọi thứ đều ổn, ks mới, đẹp, tiện nghi sạch sẽ, có hồ bơi nhưng hơi xa ks
Chỉ duy nhất thái độ nhân viên mình không hài lòng, lễ tân ko niềm nở, ở sảnh lúc nào cũng có 2-3 người Bắc có vẻ là chủ và quản lý, thái độ khinh khỉnh, gặp khách không cười chào. Điểm trừ của ks
reviews.response: Dạ, khách sạn xin gửi lời xin lỗi chân thành vì trải nghiệm không tốt của mình. Khách sạn sẽ khắc phục những điều chưa tốt ạ

reviews.title: Review phòng
reviews.text:
Phòng khá chậc, nội thất mới, sạch sẽ
Chỗ này sát chợ đêm, 22h30 mới tắt nhạc nên ồn lắm, ko phù hợp ngủ sớm
Nhân viên thân thiện, lịch sự oke
reviews.response:
Cảm ơn Quý Khách đã lựa chọn Hà Tiên Seaview trong kì nghỉ của mình.
Rất lấy làm tiếc về những trãi nghiệm chưa được tốt của quý khách, phía Khách sạn xin được chia sẻ 1 số thông tin như sau:
1.phòng khá chật => như trên thông tin chúng tôi công bố phòng quý khách lựa chọn là phòng SRV diện tích 18m2, hi vọng có thể đón quý khách 1 lần nữa với loại phòng SUP hoặ DLX với dịch tích lớn hơn.
2. 22h30 mới xuống nhạc => Khách sạn nằm ngay Tại chợ đêm và Quảng trường newvegas với khu du lịch vui chơi, giải trí thì điều này khó tránh khỏi, quý khách có thể lựa chọn loại phòng SUP sẽ luôn trong tình trạng yên tĩnh. 
Một lần nữa xin chân thành cảm ơn và hi vọng sớm được đón tiếp Quý khách trong lần tiếp theo.
Trân trọng./.

reviews.text: Cho khách checkin trễ quá
reviews.response:
kính gửi quý khách hàng,
Theo thông tin chúng tôi đã cung cấp trên các nền tảng thì thời gian nhận phòng sẽ là 14h hôm nay và trả phòng lúc 12h hôm sau. tùy tình hình phòng trống thực tế tại thời điểm quý khách nhận phòng chúng tôi luôn luôn hỗ trợ khách nhận phòng sớm hơn 14h nếu có phòng trống, trong trường hợp phòng trống không có sẵn quý khách hàng vui lòng chờ đến tối đa không quá 14h. Chúng tôi cảm ơn quý khách đã lựa chọn Hà Tiên Seaview trong kì nghỉ của mình, hi vọng sẽ được đón tiếp quý khách trong thời gian tiếp theo.

Sales Ha Tien Seaview Team.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Phòng sạch sẽ, view ok nhma wifi hơi yếu chập chờn. Cách âm k quá tốt nhưng vẫn ok
reviews.response: Cảm ơn quý khách rất nhiều, khách sạn đang cố gắng hoàn thiện 100% các khía cạnh chưa ổn🥰

reviews.title: Đánh giá nơi ở dịch vụ
reviews.text: Khác sạn view đẹp, sát chợ đêm thuận tiện ăn uống, cách TTTM hơn 1km dễ dàng mua sắm đo taxi vào Chợ Hà Tiên nhóm 6 người 50k

reviews.response: thank you so much, we hope you will come back so we can serve you next time

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Fбассейн не нашли
reviews.response: Its outside the building, 800m to the west, we dont have enough space to build inside, we very sorry about that🥹

reviews.title: Ok hotel, but wrong part of town?
reviews.text: The only reason I can think of to visit this town, is the ferry to Phu Quoc. The hotel is quite far from the ferry, and there is not a lot around that appealed to us Europeans, but might be different for locals. Only one restaurant in the area, except street food (mainly seafood). Loud karaoke chased us out of there, past the loud outdoor cinema across the street from the hotel. The room was ok, but bring earplugs if you want to go to bed early. No breakfast available.
reviews.response: Thanks for visit

reviews.title: Ha Tién
reviews.text: Fintt hotell precis vid nattmarknden.Tyvärr inga bad i närheten, om vi förstod rätt låg även poolen på annat ställe

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Hotel build in new area which isn’t developed yet. So morning time you will not find and spot for breakfast. For that you will need to take a taxi. Moreover walls between rooms are very thin and you will hear all conversations. Unfortunately next to our room was some drunken lady which starts video calling at 1:00 o’clock. So night was not a pleasure. Receptionist will not help because doesn’t speak English at all. All the rest was ok. Clean room, comfortable bad.
reviews.response: We very sorry about the noise, and thanks for visit sir !

reviews.title: Hotel for one night or short stay only
reviews.text: Clean room, no breakfast, no pool, very noisy market nearby. Price ok but after substantial discount, original not acceptable. Only fort short stay.
reviews.response: Thanks for your comment ! We have pool, but outside, we dont have enough space to build it inside hotel, we sorry about that.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: 地點位於夜市附近晚上會比較熱鬧，但附近商家早上沒有營業，要吃早餐要走約20分鐘到港口才比較熱鬧，員工很熱心協助買車票跟聯絡車來載，房間很新很乾淨。
